what: Review 007: read-only architecture review of the domain-intent vs render/adapter/parser boundary and meta simplification readiness.
usage: Answers whether the spreadsheet adapter/render stack needs action before meta simplification (no: document/guard first); classifies meta roots as persistent intent, roundtrip contract, derived render intent, or carrier artifact; identifies the parser presentation-family write as the single sanctioned reverse-boundary write and proposes a canonical-write allowlist guard test as the first slice.
